patch.value: Hybrid semantic reindex should emit bounded progress and deterministic JSON completion

During 2026-05-10 audit, pm reindex --mode hybrid --json against 685 items drove local qwen3 Ollama embeddings for over ten minutes and exited without a JSON result payload in the agent session, while hybrid search and health vectorization remained usable. Reindex needs bounded agent-facing progress, resumability/cancellation clarity, and deterministic completion output for long embedding runs.
Hybrid semantic reindex reports deterministic progress/noninteractive heartbeat, exits with JSON success or structured failure, and documents expected local-embedding runtime/resume behavior.

value.author: opencode-agent
value.text: Duplicate check: pm search hybrid reindex ollama timeout no json semantic --limit 10 found only closed historical semantic-search/search-latency items; pm dedupe-audit --type Issue --status open found no duplicate open issue.
